caption: A woman with her hair in a bun and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a podcast studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone and speaks toward someone off-screen. To her left, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text. The background features a white wall transitioning into a black section divided by a vertical yellow stripe. On-screen graphics are visible, including a logo that says "PODCAST" and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101" alongside "Employee-Only". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to speak, shifting her gaze slightly and changing her facial expressions while remaining in a seated position. The camera angle remains static throughout the clip, capturing her from the chest up.
